meta.description: RagPilot benchmark scenarios. Driven by run_benchmark.sh — each scenario is executed `runs` times and timed with millisecond precision.

scenarios.purpose: Qdrant connection, collection creation and the search/upsert flow.

args.query: Qdrant collection creation search and upsert implementation

scenarios.purpose: context_bundle efficiency on a small, isolated task.

args.task: Find where CLI status command reads index statistics

scenarios.purpose: context_bundle efficiency on a medium task.

args.task: Understand how indexing detects changed files and re-indexes only dirty files

scenarios.purpose: context_bundle token saving on a large, architectural task.

args.task: Explain the full flow from rag_search request to embedding generation, Qdrant search, result formatting, and token-budgeted context delivery

scenarios.purpose: Symbol resolution success across representative symbols.
Token reduction of `ragpilot skeleton` on large files.
Incremental indexing duration when a single file changes.
scenarios.note: config has include_dirs=["src"], so the temp file is created UNDER src/ (not benchmark/) to actually be indexed; it is deleted and re-indexed away afterwards.
